plugin.name: Current GRIB Generator
plugin.summary: Generate ocean-current GRIB files for OpenCPN.
plugin.author: tidal-current-grib-generator contributors
plugin.description: Development build of the OpenCPN Current GRIB Generator plugin. It invokes the local tidal-current-grib generator to create OpenCPN-compatible ocean-current GRIB files from synthetic or local NetCDF current data.
